name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Application Whitelisting Bypass via Bginfo
notes:
This Building Block detects execution of VBscript code that is referenced within the *.bgi file.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Application Whitelisting Bypass via Bginfo
SIGMA Description: Execute VBscript code that is referenced within the *.bgi file.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Application Whitelisting Bypass via Bginfo on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of bginfo.exe
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/popup%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/nolicprompt%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Application Whitelisting Bypass via Bginfo on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of bginfo.exe
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/popup%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/nolicprompt%') AQL filter query
